image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Ever thought gravity could bend light?
Context visual: Massive objects like galaxies warp spacetime, creating a phenomenon called gravitational lensing.
Escalation visual: This bending makes background galaxies look distorted or even multiplied!
Evidence visual: Einstein predicted this effect over a century ago, and we've seen it confirmed in observations.
Payoff visual: So, next time you look at the stars, remember: gravity isn’t just pulling, it’s shaping reality.
Cta visual: Curious for more cosmic wonders? Hit that follow button!
